prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: You are on a commercial construction project governed by building codes, submittals, and third-party inspections. The work under review is Rebar placement, part of the Structural & Ironwork scope. The observed field condition is: insufficient cover (bars touching form/ground). The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: ACI 318, ACI 117, placing drawings.
title: Compliance check: Rebar placement (commercial project)
